author: pytorch-bot
text:
Hello there! From the UNSTABLE prefix in this issue title, it looks like you are attempting to unstable a job in PyTorch CI. The information I have parsed is below:

* Job name: `Check mergeability and dependencies for ghstack prs / pr-dependencies-check / check`
* Credential: `izaitsevfb`

Within ~15 minutes, `Check mergeability and dependencies for ghstack prs / pr-dependencies-check / check` and all of its dependants will be unstable in PyTorch CI. Please verify that the job name looks correct. With great power comes great responsibility.

author: huydhn
text:
Well, I don't think this issue would work unfortunately because making a job as unstable requires the running of `filter-test-configs` GHA <https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/blob/main/.github/actions/filter-test-configs/action.yml#L130> and that's not part of <https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/blob/main/.github/workflows/check_mergeability_ghstack.yml>.

On the other hand, we could add the failure into <https://github.com/pytorch/test-infra/blob/generated-stats/stats/flaky-rules.json> to explicitly set it as flaky, which achieve the same thing. Let me update that now.
